response.justification: Bogdan has exceptional technical depth, open-source contributions, and cross-domain experience, but lacks demonstrated leadership in IT architecture, team management at executive level, and German proficiency (only 'Basic' vs required C1), which are critical for this role.
strengths: Extensive open-source contributions with real-world impact (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts)
Proven full-stack expertise across languages, platforms, and architectures (DLang, Node, TypeScript, Linux)
Strong track record in mentoring, workshops, and knowledge sharing (Selenium course, Web Internals)
concerns: German language proficiency is only 'Basic', falling far short of required C1 level
No clear evidence of leading teams, managing client projects, or architectural ownership at executive level
Lacks explicit experience with UML, requirements management, or IT compliance/risk frameworks
